title: Monday CRM Implementation Step by step Guide

posts.author: BDSpecialist (Lilian Oliveira)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’m getting started with implementing Monday CRM and was wondering if there’s a step-by-step guide to ensure I cover everything needed before rolling it out to my team.

For those who’ve gone through the onboarding process, could you share your experience and any resources you found especially helpful?

Thank you so much!

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
This might be helpful

monday.com

monday academy | Skills, Training, Courses, Webinars & Certifications

Unlock your full potential with the monday academy. Explore expert-led courses, hands-on training, webinars, and certifications designed to help you master monday.com and boost your career.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Definitely check out the academy that Anish linked. Also check out monday’s CRM articles. There’s not really a ‘checklist’ as each implementation is going to be different based on your use case.

What system are you moving from?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: BDSpecialist (Lilian Oliveira)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Desiree, thanks for your response. We actually don’t have a CRM in place so we’re moving from excel spreadsheets to Monday. I was under the impression that a Monday rep would implement the system, after you buy it, but I guess not. Did you implement that yourself?

posts.author: Tom-CXmonday (Tom)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @BDSpecialist, Tom from monday Just popping in to say that, besides resources like the academy and our knowledge base, which were mentioned above, we also have Partners and Experts who can help with monday implementation at a cost. I recommend exploring that option too, if you’re interested
